headline: The Week in Business: Facebook Under Pressure and Ozy Media Shuts Down
snippet_or_abstract: Facebook  postponed the start of its “Instagram Kids” product and a  Ozy Media shut down, just five days after a report raised questions about its business strategy.

headline: Whistle-Blower Says Facebook ‘Chooses Profits Over Safety’

headline: Gone in Minutes, Out for Hours: Outage Shakes Facebook
snippet_or_abstract: When apps used by billions of people worldwide blinked out, lives were disrupted, businesses were cut off from customers — and some Facebook employees were locked out of their offices.

headline: Users turn to Twitter after Facebook outage. Jokes and venting ensue.

headline: Your Tuesday Briefing
snippet_or_abstract: A lengthy outage shakes Facebook and its apps.
lead_paragraph: Facebook and its family of apps, including Messenger, Instagram and WhatsApp, were inaccessible for over five hours yesterday, taking out a vital communications platform used by billions and showcasing just how dependent the world has become on a company that is under intense scrutiny.

headline: Stephen Colbert Kicks Facebook While It’s Down
snippet_or_abstract: “As the panic grew, Facebook did not say what might be causing the outage. Now, I’m no computer expert, but my theory is a just god?” Colbert joked.

headline: Facebook’s Apps Went Down. The World Saw How Much It Runs on Them.
snippet_or_abstract: The outage disrupted the digital lives of small-business owners, politicians, aid workers and others. But for some, it was a welcome reprieve.
lead_paragraph: For more than five hours on Monday, the world got a taste of life without Facebook and its apps.

headline: Going Down

headline: Facebook’s outage frustrates advertisers heading into the holiday season.
snippet_or_abstract: “There may be heads on pikes by the end of this,” one agency executive said.
lead_paragraph: For more than five hours on Monday, while Facebook and Instagram were dark, David Herrmann fretted about ads.

headline: Just What Is Happening With Facebook?
snippet_or_abstract: “Stop using Facebook!” one reader urges. Another admits to a possible addiction but finds it useful. Readers offer varied opinions about the company.

headline: Facebook says its outage was caused by a cascade of errors.
snippet_or_abstract: For more than five hours, the company’s family of apps, including Instagram and WhatsApp, were unavailable to the billions who use them.
lead_paragraph: A cascade of mistakes made during maintenance on Facebook’s network caused the outage that took its services offline Monday, the company said in a blog post published on Tuesday.

headline: Facebook Was Down for a Few Hours. Should It Go Away Forever?
snippet_or_abstract: Leaked internal documents show that the world’s dependency on Facebook and its family of apps comes at a great cost.
